name: openinterstate
title: OpenInterstate
description: Structured US interstate highway data derived from OpenStreetMap: directional corridors, normalized exits, linked places, and reference routes, published as dated, checksummed releases.

licenses.name: ODbL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Open Database License 1.0

sources.title: OpenStreetMap via the Geofabrik US extract

fields.name: corridor_id
fields.description: Stable identifier for one directional corridor.

fields.name: interstate_name
fields.description: Interstate the corridor belongs to, like I-10.

fields.name: direction_code
fields.description: Canonical travel direction, like east.

fields.name: direction_label
fields.description: Capitalized form of direction_code.

fields.name: geometry_geojson
fields.description: Corridor geometry as GeoJSON LineString or MultiLineString text.

fields.name: edge_count
fields.description: Number of graph edges assigned to the corridor.

fields.name: edge_id
fields.description: Deterministic edge identifier, like edge/I-35E/10125498410/82123455.

fields.name: corridor_id
fields.description: Corridor the edge belongs to.

fields.name: interstate_name
fields.description: Interstate of the parent corridor.

fields.name: direction_code
fields.description: Canonical direction of the parent corridor.

fields.name: length_m
fields.description: Edge length in meters.

fields.name: geometry_geojson
fields.description: Edge geometry as GeoJSON LineString text.

resources.name: corridor_exits
resources.description: Normalized exits linked to a corridor.

fields.name: exit_id
fields.description: OSM-derived exit identifier, like node/338162665.

fields.name: corridor_id
fields.description: Corridor the exit sits on.

fields.name: interstate_name
fields.description: Interstate of the parent corridor.

fields.name: direction_code
fields.description: Canonical direction of the parent corridor.

fields.name: sequence_index
fields.description: Zero-based position of the exit along the corridor.

fields.name: exit_number
fields.description: Posted exit number from OSM, like 1A. May be empty.

fields.name: exit_name
fields.description: Exit name from OSM. May be empty.

fields.name: lat
fields.description: Exit latitude in WGS84.

fields.name: lon
fields.description: Exit longitude in WGS84.

fields.name: geometry_geojson
fields.description: Exit location as GeoJSON Point text.

resources.name: exit_aliases
resources.description: Source exit aliases mapped to normalized exits.
resources.note: Ships empty in the current release. The alias-normalization layer is not yet populated.

fields.name: canonical_exit_id
fields.description: Normalized exit that aliases collapse into.

fields.name: source_exit_id
fields.description: Source exit mapped onto the canonical exit.

fields.name: place_id
fields.description: OSM-derived place identifier, like node/10000051746.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Place category, like evCharging or restArea.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name from OSM.

fields.name: display_name
fields.description: Name prepared for display.

fields.name: brand
fields.description: Brand from OSM. May be empty.

fields.name: geometry_geojson
fields.description: Place location as GeoJSON Point text.

resources.name: exit_place_links
resources.description: Spatial proximity links between exits and places.

fields.name: exit_id
fields.description: Exit side of the link. Joins corridor_exits.exit_id.

fields.name: place_id
fields.description: Place side of the link. Joins places.place_id.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Category of the linked place.

fields.name: distance_m
fields.description: Distance from exit to place in meters.

fields.name: rank
fields.description: Proximity rank of the place for this exit, starting at 1.

resources.name: reference_routes
resources.description: Routes for QA, examples, and exploration.
resources.note: Only corridors that meet the route-builder thresholds are emitted. Short corridors may appear in corridors.csv without a matching reference route.

fields.name: reference_route_id
fields.description: Deterministic route identifier.

fields.name: interstate_name
fields.description: Interstate the route follows, like I-10.

fields.name: direction_code
fields.description: Compact direction code, like EB.

fields.name: direction_label
fields.description: Readable direction, like Eastbound.

fields.name: display_name
fields.description: Route name, like I-10 Eastbound.

fields.name: distance_m
fields.description: Route distance in meters.

fields.name: duration_s
fields.description: Estimated drive time in seconds.

fields.name: point_count
fields.description: Number of coordinates in the route geometry.

fields.name: geometry_geojson
fields.description: Route geometry as GeoJSON LineString or MultiLineString text.
